subcodes.first_line: O thou exalted branch of the Divine Lote-Tree! The letter of the 11th of Rajab hath, after some time, reached me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الرحمانیه نامه ۱۱ رجب بعد از مدتی واصل گردید لذا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God
